title: University of Southampton Delhi Programme Overview
text: Discover our programmes Our programmes are taught in English, and content is equivalent to that delivered to other University of Southampton students. To match the programme lengths of internationally respected UK awarded degrees, undergraduates study for three years, and postgraduates study for one year.
summary: An overview of the University of Southampton Delhi programmes, detailing their English-taught curriculum, equivalence to UK degrees, and typical durations for undergraduate and postgraduate studies.

title: Programme: BEng (Hons) Software Engineering
text: BEng (Hons) Software Engineering Learn to develop reliable, complex and secure software systems. From mobile banking apps to aircraft autopilot controls, you’ll learn how to analyse software requirements, and then design, build and test a system that meets them. Duration: 3 years Course Type: Full Time Start Date: Aug, 2026
summary: The BEng (Hons) Software Engineering programme teaches students to develop reliable and secure software systems, covering analysis, design, building, and testing of complex applications.

title: Programme: BSc (Hons) Accounting and Finance
text: BSc (Hons) Accounting and Finance A prestigious degree for those aiming to enter the fields of commerce, accountancy and finance. Learn how to prepare and interpret financial and managerial information and gain a sound understanding of investment and finance, while shaping the degree towards your objectives. Duration: 3 years Course Type: Full Time Start Date: Aug, 2026
summary: The BSc (Hons) Accounting and Finance degree prepares students for careers in commerce, accountancy, and finance, focusing on interpreting financial information and understanding investment principles.

title: Programme: BSc (Hons) Business Management
text: BSc (Hons) Business Management Learn to think differently about business and inspire change within organisations and society with an interdisciplinary approach Develop skills and knowledge to navigate complex business environments, covering foundational management through specialised modules in disciplines of accounting and finance, analytics, marketing, and business management. Duration: 3 years Course Type: Full Time Start Date: Aug, 2026
summary: The BSc (Hons) Business Management programme develops skills for navigating complex business environments using an interdisciplinary approach, covering foundational management and specialised modules.

title: Programme: BSc (Hons) Computer Science
text: BSc (Hons) Computer Science Learn how to design and build software programs and systems, and find out about the latest advances in areas like machine learning, cyber security and computer vision in this fast-moving industry. You will gain the knowledge to develop technologies that can make a difference to people’s lives. Duration: 3 years Course Type: Full Time Start Date: Aug, 2026
summary: The BSc (Hons) Computer Science programme teaches software design and systems building, exploring advances in machine learning, cybersecurity, and computer vision for impactful technology development.

title: Programme: BSc (Hons) Creative Computing
text: BSc (Hons) Creative Computing Build immersive and engaging digital experiences that bring art, and technology together in our creative computing degree. The programme develops creative, technical and intellectual strengths drawing on industry-standard technology and philosophical and ethical approaches. Duration: 3 years Course Type: Full Time Start Date: Aug, 2026
summary: The BSc (Hons) Creative Computing programme merges art and technology to build immersive digital experiences, developing creative, technical, and intellectual strengths with industry-standard tools.

title: Programme: BSc (Hons) Economics
text: BSc (Hons) Economics Learn how our economic decisions affect others, and how business and financial institutions' choices can affect our society. This programme gives you an in-depth understanding of economic theory, and the skills you need to work in sectors like finance, management and industry. Duration: 3 years Course Type: Full Time Start Date: Aug, 2026
summary: The BSc (Hons) Economics programme provides an in-depth understanding of economic theory, preparing students for careers in finance, management, and industry by exploring societal economic impacts.

title: Programme: MSc Economics
text: MSc Economics Gain in-depth knowledge of the concepts, methods and applications of modern microeconomics, macroeconomics and econometrics, and prepare for a career as an economist working in finance, consulting and policy, or continue research studies. Duration: 1 year Course Type: Full Time Start Date: Aug, 2026
summary: The MSc Economics programme offers in-depth knowledge of modern microeconomics, macroeconomics, and econometrics, preparing graduates for careers as economists in finance, consulting, policy, or research.

title: Programme: MSc Finance
text: MSc Finance Develop skills sought by employers in rapidly changing and complex financial environments, and advance your career in industry, government or research. You will study advanced stock market analysis, corporate finance, portfolio management and behavioural finance, and explore behavioural biases that can affect financial decision making in uncertain environments. Duration: 1 year Course Type: Full Time Start Date: Aug, 2026
summary: The MSc Finance programme develops skills for complex financial environments, covering advanced stock market analysis, corporate finance, portfolio management, and behavioural finance for industry and research careers.

title: Programme: MSc International Management
text: MSc International Management Learn how a business operates and study key management concepts. The programme will give you insights into becoming an effective business manager in core management functions in our globalised workplace Duration: 1 year Course Type: Full Time Start Date: Aug, 2026
summary: The MSc International Management programme provides insights into business operations and core management concepts, preparing students to become effective managers in a globalised workplace.

title: Application Information for University of Southampton Delhi
text: Apply for this academic year Applications are open now for the first students to walk through the doors in August 2025. Follow this link to start your application today! Apply now
summary: Application details for the University of Southampton Delhi, inviting prospective students to apply for the August 2025 intake.
